meta.title: Vilo Academy — CRC Elite Training
meta.description: Bilingual, audit-ready training for Clinical Research Coordinators (FDA / ICH-GCP).

login.title: Student access
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your CRC training on the audit-ready learning platform.

landing.heroTitle: Become a Clinical Research Coordinator You Can Count On
landing.heroSubtitle: Practical, GCP-aligned training built around TransCelerate standards, IATA logistics, and real site workflows.
landing.value1Body: Focus on what sponsors and monitors look for.
landing.why1: Aligned to how sponsors frame training — TransCelerate criteria.
landing.why2: Logistics literacy — IATA and specimen handling.
landing.why3: One arc — fifteen pre-capstone modules (M4 = ALCOA+ / logs anchor; M9 = IP & cold chain) plus a multi-station OSCE capstone (ALCOA+ repair at OSCE.S5).
landing.curriculumSubtitle: Roughly 60–80 hours • fifteen pre-capstone modules + integrated OSCE capstone • M4 anchors ALCOA+ / master logs; M9 covers investigational product & cold chain; OSCE.S5 stresses source & ALCOA+ repair • learn in order or revisit.
landing.enrollIncludes: Full access, practice activities, certificate, and ongoing access to materials.
landing.enrolledCta: Already enrolled? Access your course on the learning platform.

studentDashboard.trustBody: Sessions and progress align with GCP, ICH E6(R3), and TransCelerate-style training expectations.
studentDashboard.title: Training dashboard
studentDashboard.subtitle: Welcome back to Vilo Academy — CRC Elite Training.
studentDashboard.planSubtitle: Fifteen SOP-versioned modules — complete in order or revisit as needed.

dashboard.subtitle: Audit-ready progress for your CRC certification path.
dashboard.modulesHint: 15 modules from ethics through FDA inspections — versioned against your SOPs.
dashboard.examsHint: Pending quizzes and signature-gated certifications (e.g. IATA / DOT).
dashboard.certsHint: Records retained per policy; critical certs require verified identity.
dashboard.statDocsHint: Progress across all 52 ICH-GCP essential documents.
dashboard.shellNote: Content from Google AI Studio mounts here — this shell is your compliance-grade frame.
dashboard.integrationN8n: n8n can POST completion events to /api/webhooks/n8n
dashboard.integrationAudit: Supabase stores audit events (IP + User-Agent) via append_audit RPC

signature.title: Digital signature & identity attestation
signature.description: Required before issuing transport or regulatory-critical certificates. Your IP address and browser fingerprint are recorded for the audit trail.
signature.phraseTarget: I attest that I personally completed this training.
signature.checkboxTraining: I confirm I personally completed the training associated with this certificate.
signature.checkboxIdentity: I confirm the name above is my legal identity for compliance records.
signature.success: Signature recorded. Audit trail persisted in Supabase.

footer.tagline: CRC Elite Training — FDA / ICH-GCP audit-ready learning shell

pages.modulesBody: Fifteen versioned modules (ethics → FDA inspections). Mount AI-generated lessons and SOP links here.
pages.documentsBody: Tracker for all 52 essential documents — wire to progreso_documentos_ich and documentos_esenciales.
pages.certificatesBody: Issuance history and downloads — connect to firmas_digitales and your PDF generator.
